race.comment: Terrific race with a host of win chances but giving the top mare DAKOTA LEE (1) another chance despite the big weight. Kept coming and finished a head away in third here last time in yet another top run. Drawn well and will be in the finish again. WATADEEL (4) comes here off a let-up since finishing sixth in Group 3 company at Morphettville over their carnival. Has a big finish and will wind up late. ZONDEE (8) is also having his first look at Darwin being a former Queenslander having first run for the new yard. Expected to measure up. STORMFRONT (10) has a great record here and will be tough to stop fresh. CROWN WATERS (12) was too strong fresh beating DAKOTA LEE and expected to feature despite the tough draw. Couldn't find a place for the Alice Springs Cup winner and good mare Magic Defence.
